title: BEM-536 task1 curator analyst plan
objective:

"""
base = Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem536')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
reports = Path('governance/reports')
reports.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
proofs.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
role_state = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')
state = json.loads(role_state.read_text()) if role_state.exists() else {}

roadmap = Path('governance/tasks/pending/BEM536_INTERNAL_CONTOUR_AUTOTEST_ROADMAP.md')
roadmap.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
roadmap.write_text('# BEM-536 | Internal Contour Full Development Cycle Autotest Roadmap\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 13:34 (UTC+3)\n\n## Цель\nПроверить, что внутренний контур разработки работоспособен на полном цикле: curator -> analyst -> auditor -> executor -> auditor final -> curator closure.\n\n## Тестовая задача разработки\nСоздать новый development artifact `governance/internal_contour/tests/bem536/development_artifact.md`, провести его через анализ, аудит, исполнение и закрытие.\n\n## Три задачи roadmap\n\n### Task 1 — Curator intake + Analyst plan\nCurator принимает synthetic development request, назначает analyst, analyst создаёт план реализации.\nPASS: intake, analyst plan, transport records, role state updated.\n\n### Task 2 — Auditor approval + Executor patch\nAuditor проверяет план, executor создаёт development artifact.\nPASS: audit approval, development artifact, execution record, SHA.\n\n### Task 3 — Final audit + Curator closure\nAuditor final проверяет artifact, curator закрывает cycle, обновляет contour_status.\nPASS: final audit PASS, curator closure, done-marker, final report, blocker=null.\n')

cycle = 'bem536-internal-contour-autotest'
intake = {
  'record_type':'curator_intake',
  'cycle_id':cycle,
  'source':'gpt',
  'source_ref':'operator-request-internal-contour-autotest',
  'request_title':'BEM-536 internal contour full cycle autotest',
  'request_body':'Create and validate development artifact through full internal role cycle.',
  'priority':'high',
  'curator_status':'ASSIGNED',
  'next_role':'analyst',
  'blocker':None,
  'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 13:34 (UTC+3)'
}
analyst = {
  'record_type':'analysis',
  'cycle_id':cycle,
  'source':'internal',
  'from_role':'analyst',
  'to_role':'auditor',
  'status':'completed',
  'artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem536/analyst_plan.md',
  'commit_sha':None,
  'blocker':None,
  'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 13:34 (UTC+3)'
}
(base/'curator_intake.json').write_text(json.dumps(intake, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
(base/'analyst_plan.md').write_text('# BEM-536 Analyst Plan\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 13:34 (UTC+3)\n\n## Development request\nCreate `governance/internal_contour/tests/bem536/development_artifact.md`.\n\n## Required cycle\ncurator -> analyst -> auditor -> executor -> auditor final -> curator closure.\n\n## Acceptance criteria\n- development artifact exists;\n- transport records exist;\n- role_cycle_state updated;\n- contour_status updated;\n- blocker=null.\n')

with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(intake, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
    f.write(json.dumps(analyst, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

state['cycle_id'] = cycle
state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 13:34 (UTC+3)'
state['source'] = {'type':'gpt','id':'BEM-536'}
state['curator_status'] = 'ASSIGNED'
state['active_role'] = 'analyst'
state['next_role'] = 'auditor'
state['current_task'] = {'id':'BEM-536.1','title':'Curator intake + Analyst plan','status':'completed'}
state['blocker'] = None
hist = state.get('history', [])
if not isinstance(hist, list):
    hist = [hist]
hist.append({'at':'2026-05-17 | 13:34 (UTC+3)','event':'BEM-536 Task 1 completed: curator intake and analyst plan','status':'PASS'})
state['history'] = hist
role_state.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

report = reports/'bem536_task1_curator_analyst_plan.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-536 Task 1 | Curator Intake + Analyst Plan | PASS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 13:34 (UTC+3)\n\n## Выполнено\n- Roadmap из 3 задач создана.\n- Curator intake artifact создан.\n- Analyst plan artifact создан.\n- Transport records appended.\n- role_cycle_state updated.\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')
proof = proofs/'bem536_task1_curator_analyst_plan.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-536 Task 1 PASS: curator intake and analyst plan completed. blocker=null\n')

changed_files.extend([str(roadmap), str(base/'curator_intake.json'), str(base/'analyst_plan.md'), str(transport), str(role_state), str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-536 Task 1: curator intake and analyst plan completed')
"""
